title: Rinehart’s $200m donation to convert homes for veterans welcomed by RSL – as it happened
summary_full:
This blog is now closedAustralians ‘uneasy’ about NDIS cuts amid $53bn in new defence spending, Mark Butler concedesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastJames Valentine’s family has released a statement after his death. Here’s what they had to say:James passed peacefully at home surrounded by his family, who adored him.
 Throughout his illness, James did it his way, which lasted all the way until the end when he made the choice to do Voluntary Assisted Dying.
 Both he and his family are grateful he was given the option to go out on his own terms. He was calm, dignified as always and somehow still making us laugh. Continue reading...
